search.query: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/TA-cribl-decrypt/storage/passwords | spath input=clear_password | search eai:acl.app="TA-cribl-decrypt" | rename username as "Key ID" | rename description as "Description" | rename algorithm as "Algorithm" | rename keyclass as "Key Class" | rename kms as KMS | rename lastUpdated as "Last Updated" | table "Key ID" "Key Class" KMS Description Algorithm "Last Updated"

html.div: Download your keybundle from Cribl Stream and upload it here. See the documentation on Creating and Managing Encryption Keys for more information.

div.p: Note: Keys are stored based on their keyId in the keys.json. Uploading keys with the same IDs as existing keys will result in that key being overwritten.

div.style: display: none; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid red; background-color: #f8d7da; color: #721c24;
display: none; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid green; background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724;

p.span: Refresh the page to see the uploaded key information under "Existing keys".

div.style: display: none; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid red; background-color: #f8d7da; color: #721c24;
display: none; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid green; background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724;

p.span: Refresh the page to see the updated key list under "Existing keys".

form.label: Enter the key ID to delete:
